name: svg-vectorizer
description: Convert raster images into clean or high-fidelity SVGs with validation and optional repair.

interface.shortDescription: Convert images to SVG with validation and repair.
interface.longDescription: SVG Vectorizer converts raster images into SVG candidates using vtracer by default, supports pixel-fidelity SVG when explicitly requested, validates outputs with browserless image metrics, and can rerun bounded repair profiles.
defaultPrompt: Convert this image to a clean editable SVG.
Create both vtracer and pixel SVGs, then compare them.
Validate this SVG trace and suggest repair settings.
